description: CompositionGrey melange T-shirt made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, that has mock neck with neon yellow tape detailing on the inseam, neon yellow zippered chest placket, long raglan sleeves, black mesh inserts on the arm pit area ,swoosh logo embossed on the upper left chest and reflector strips on the sleevesFittingComfortWash careMachine was warmWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryThis grey melange T-shirt from nike is made of Dri-Fit fabric that wicks sweat away from the body to the fabric's surface, where it quickly evaporates. Spandex fibres allow it to stretch for better mobility and a comfortable, athletic fit. The Element Half-Zip features a fitted design that stays out of your way as you run. Ergonomic seams map the natural contours of your body to help reduce friction and chaffing while providing great range of motion. The mock collar delivers extra warmth and protection when you need it, and the mesh under arm vents increase airflow in this high-heat area to help you stay dry and comfortable. Rough on the weather, soft on you, the nike Element t-shirt helps you stay dry, comfortable and distraction-free from the first mile to the last.
